name: curiositypedia
description: Branching, source-backed learning built as an OpenAI Site.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --experimental-loader ./tests/cloudflare-loader.mjs --test tests/rendered-html.test.mjs && tsx --test tests/fixtures.test.mjs tests/client-api.test.mjs tests/bookmarks-client.test.mjs tests/i18n.test.mjs tests/routes.test.mjs tests/journey-graph.test.ts tests/provider-auth.test.mjs && tsx --test tests/journey-map.test.ts && tsx --test tests/leaf-views.test.ts && node --experimental-loader ./tests/cloudflare-loader.mjs --import tsx --test tests/background-research.test.mjs tests/bookmark-integration.test.mjs tests/bookmarks-repository.test.mjs tests/diagnostics.test.mjs tests/journey-management-repository.test.mjs tests/landing-recommendations-repository.test.mjs tests/live-redraw.test.mjs tests/live-repository-lease.test.mjs tests/live-research.test.mjs tests/openai-controls.test.mjs tests/preferences-repository.test.mjs tests/provider-cost-control.test.mjs tests/provider-usage.test.mjs tests/repository-read-model.test.mjs tests/research-status-repository.test.mjs tests/snapshots-repository.test.mjs tests/starter-content.test.mjs tests/usage-summary.test.mjs
